title: The Good Earth
director: Sidney Franklin, Victor Fleming, Gustav Machatý
writer: Talbot Jennings, Tess Slesinger, Claudine West
actors: Paul Muni, Luise Rainer, Walter Connolly
plot: Although married Chinese farmers Wang and O-Lan initially experience success, their lives are complicated by declining fortunes and lean times, as well as the arrival of the beautiful young Lotus.
